description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly gray and orange color scheme. The body is constructed with angular, reinforced panels and includes metallic accents, visible bolts, and vented sections along the barrel. The stock is robust and geometric, with a large cutout and orange highlights, providing ergonomic support. The receiver area is detailed with layered components, a visible trigger guard, and a magazine or shell holder beneath. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with venting along the top and a reinforced muzzle. The overall appearance suggests a high-tech, durable weapon suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A futuristic, angular shotgun with a gray and orange color scheme, featuring a vented barrel and robust geometric stock. Detailed with metallic accents and tactical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, angular stock, vented barrel, and detailed receiver with orange highlights.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle, barrel venting, and compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same structural features as view 0, with visible magazine and stock cutout.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's large cutout, grip, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top and a reinforced muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with reinforced edges and a smooth contour
